name: Springerle
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour; measure out 4 cups and add the baking powder, then sift again.
2. Gradually beat in the eggs to the sugar until very thick.
3. Pour boiling water over the anise seed and mix into the egg mixture.
4. Stir in the flour. Chill.
5. Roll on a lightly floured board to about 1/4 inch thickness.
6. Roll again with a Springerle roller to create designs.
7. Cut cookies along the marked outlines and place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Let dry at room temperature for 6 to 8 hours.
9. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 12 to 15 minutes, or until brown.
Makes 4 dozen cookies.
